title: Pothole on Main Street
description: Large pothole near the intersection causing damage to vehicles. Needs urgent repair.

title: Broken pavement in park
description: The pavement in the central park has cracked and is dangerous for pedestrians.

title: Road flooding after rain
description: Water accumulates on the road after every rain. Drainage seems blocked.

title: Uneven road surface
description: The road surface is very uneven. Many bumps and cracks.

title: Missing road markings
description: Street markings are faded. Difficult to see lanes at night.

title: Garbage not collected for a week
description: Our area garbage has not been picked up for 7 days. Bins are overflowing.

title: Illegal dumping near school
description: Someone is dumping waste near the school building. Smell and health hazard.

title: Overflowing bins on corner
description: Public bins at the corner are always full. Need more frequent collection.

title: Stray animals near trash
description: Stray dogs and cats gather around uncovered garbage. Need better disposal.

title: Recycling not picked up
description: Recycling bins have not been collected for two weeks.

title: No water supply since morning
description: There is no water in our area since 6 AM. No prior notice given.

title: Low water pressure
description: Water pressure is very low on the third floor. Cannot use shower properly.

title: Dirty water from tap
description: Brown water is coming from the tap. Possibly pipe or reservoir issue.

title: Water leakage on street
description: Water is leaking from a main line on the street. Wasting a lot of water.

title: Intermittent supply
description: Water supply is irregular. Sometimes no water for hours.

title: Street light not working
description: The lamp post near the bus stop has been off for days. Dark at night.

title: Multiple lights out on avenue
description: Several street lights are not working on the main avenue. Safety concern.

title: Flickering light
description: One street light keeps flickering. Needs repair or replacement.

title: No lights in alley
description: The alley behind the market has no lighting. Very unsafe at night.

title: Broken lamp post
description: A lamp post is bent and the light is broken. Should be replaced.

title: Blocked drain causing smell
description: The drain near the market is blocked. Bad smell and mosquitoes.

title: Sewage overflow on road
description: Sewage is overflowing onto the road. Health hazard for residents.

title: Drainage clogged after rain
description: After rain the drainage does not clear. Water stays for days.

title: Open drain near school
description: Open drain near school gate. Children at risk. Needs cover.

title: Drain water mixing with drinking line
description: Sewage drain water seems to be mixing. Water quality issue.

title: Another huge pothole
description: New pothole appeared after last week rain. Very deep.

title: Road repair incomplete
description: Road repair was started but left incomplete. Loose gravel everywhere.

title: Garbage truck skipped our lane
description: Garbage truck did not come to our lane today. Bins still full.

title: Burning of garbage
description: People are burning garbage in the open. Causing smoke and pollution.

title: No water in apartment block
description: Entire apartment block has no water. Tank might be empty or pump issue.

title: Rusty water
description: Water from tap has rust color. Old pipes may need replacement.

title: Dark stretch on highway
description: Long stretch with no street lights. Accidents reported.

title: Light pole damaged
description: Street light pole is damaged in storm. Hanging wires.

title: Drain cover missing
description: Manhole cover is missing. Someone could fall in.

title: Flooding in basement
description: Basement floods every time it rains. Drainage not connected properly.
